# seerr_discover_slider (Data Source)

Read discovery sliders from Seerr via `/api/v1/settings/discover`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_discover_slider" "all" {}

output "first_slider_title" {
  value = data.seerr_discover_slider.all.sliders[0].title
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `sliders` (Attributes List) The list of discovery sliders. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sliders))

<a id="nestedatt--sliders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sliders`

Read-Only:

- `data` (String) The data/query for the slider.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the slider is enabled.
- `id` (Number) The internal ID of the slider.
- `is_built_in` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in slider.
- `title` (String) The title of the slider.
- `type` (Number) The type of the slider.
